title: adhatoda patula
intro: Adhatoda patula, also known as Neesia or Vasaka, is a plant species native to India and other parts of Asia, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The medicinal properties of Adhatoda patula include its antispasmodic and bronchodilatory effects, which make it useful in treating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve coughs, reduce inflammation, and improve respiratory function. Adhatoda patula is often prepared into herbal teas, decoctions, and powders, which are used in traditional medicine to treat various respiratory conditions.
